zh.lifeSummary: 當James Lawson Esquire於1500年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋時，他的父親William Lawson20歲，母親Anne Horsley36歲。他於1521年與Lady Alison Bertram在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他在英國諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋被列為merchant。他去世於1546年2月24日在英國諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋享年46歲。

nameMeanings.name: Lawson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and northern English: patronymic ‘son of Lawrence’; see   Law   1. It is also found in Ireland since the 17th century.
Americanized form of Swedish   Larsson   and Danish, Norwegian or North German   Larsen  .

variants.name: Law
meanings: Scottish and northern English: from a Middle English personal name Law(e), a short form of Lawrence .

Scottish and northern English: topographic name for someone who lived near a hill, northern Middle English law (from Old English hlāw, which generally became low in the south and law in the north). Compare Lowe and Lew .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 羅, based on its Cantonese pronunciation, see   Luo   1.

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

en.lifeSummary: When James Lawson Esquire was born in 1500, in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Lawson, was 20 and his mother, Anne Horsley, was 36. He married Lady Alison Bertram in 1521, in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. His occupation is listed as merchant in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England. He died on 24 February 1546, in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque James Lawson Esquire est né en 1500, à Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Lawson, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Anne Horsley, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Lady Alison Bertram en 1521, à Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est merchant à Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 24 février 1546, à Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: James Lawson Esquireが1500年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドニューカストル ウプオン トインで生まれた時，父William Lawsonは20歳，母Anne Horsleyは36歳であった。1521年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドニューカストル ウプオン トインでLady Alison Bertramと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。イギリスノースウンバーランドニューカストル ウプオン トインでの職業はmerchantと記録されている。彼は1546年2月24日にイギリスノースウンバーランドニューカストル ウプオン トインで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: James Lawson Esquire(이)가 1500년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Lawson(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Horsley(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1521년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니에서 Lady Alison Bertram(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니에서 merchant이었다. 그는 1546년 2월 24일 영국 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando James Lawson Esquire nasceu em 1500, em Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Lawson, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Anne Horsley, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Alison Bertram em 1521, em Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como merchant em Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 24 de fevereiro de 1546, em Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда James Lawson Esquire родился в 1500 г. в местности нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Lawson было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Horsley, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Alison Bertram в 1521 г. в местности нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери.  Он работал по профессии merchant в местности нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия. Он умер 24 февраля 1546 г. в местности нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 46 лет.

Se casó con Lady Alison Bertram en 1521, en Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era merchant en Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Murió el 24 de febrero de 1546, en Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 46 años.
